name: Jp Dollars store plus check cashing
description_short: JP Dollars Store Plus Check Cashing is a check-cashing and financial services provider located in Miami, FL, offering extended hours and basic money services.
description_long: JP Dollars Store Plus Check Cashing operates as a check-cashing and money services business located at 15024 NE 6th Ave in Miami, Florida. The business appears to serve the local community with financial transaction needs, operating under a combined dollar store and check-cashing model. The company's name suggests a hybrid retail and financial services approach, though specific ownership, founding date, and company history are not disclosed in the available source material. Like many check-cashing establishments, the business likely serves unbanked and underbanked populations who need immediate access to funds without traditional bank accounts. The company offers standard check-cashing services as its primary offering, with phone contact available at (786) 613-2442 for customer inquiries. JP Dollars Store Plus distinguishes itself through exceptionally extended operating hours, remaining open from 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM every single day of the week, including weekends and holidays. This 15-hour daily availability is notably broader than typical banking hours and even many alternative financial service providers, making it accessible to customers with non-traditional schedules. The business operates in Miami's Northeast 6th Avenue area, serving a specific geographic community. A significant caveat is that the available information is extremely limited—only basic contact details, address, and hours are documented. No pricing information, fee structures, specific service details, customer reviews, licensing status, or regulatory information is available from the provided source. Customers considering this service should independently verify all rates, terms, and legitimacy before conducting transactions.

Accessibility: Operates in underserved geographic area with likely unbanked population
Hybrid services: Combined dollar store and check-cashing model offers one-stop convenience
cons: No pricing transparency: Website provides no fee schedules or rate information

Minimal online presence: Only Waze listing available; no dedicated website or social media

best_for: Unbanked individuals needing immediate check-cashing access outside traditional banking hours
Workers on non-traditional schedules requiring evening or weekend financial services
Local Miami residents in the Northeast 6th Avenue area seeking convenient money services
diagnosis: JP Dollars Store Plus Check Cashing is best for unbanked or underbanked Miami residents needing check-cashing services during extended hours, particularly those unable to access traditional banks. The main caveat is the complete absence of online transparency regarding fees, terms, or service details—customers must contact the business directly or visit in person to understand pricing and eligibility requirements.
